mapper.select:
SELECT event_type as eventType, count(DISTINCT patient_unique_id) as count FROM clinical_event_derived
GROUP BY event_type

SELECT ce.clinical_event_id AS clinicalEventId, ce.event_type AS eventType, p.stable_id AS patientId, cs.cancer_study_identifier AS studyId, ce.start_date AS startDate, ce.stop_date AS stopDate, ced.`key` AS `key`, ced.value AS value FROM clinical_event ce INNER JOIN patient p ON ce.patient_id = p.internal_id INNER JOIN cancer_study cs ON p.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT clinical_event_id, CAST(`key` AS Nullable(String)) AS `key`, CAST(value AS Nullable(String)) AS value FROM clinical_event_data WHERE clinical_event_id IN ( SELECT ce2.clinical_event_id FROM clinical_event ce2 INNER JOIN patient p2 ON ce2.patient_id = p2.internal_id INNER JOIN cancer_study cs2 ON p2.cancer_study_id = cs2.cancer_study_id WHERE cs2.cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId} AND p2.stable_id = #{patientId} ) ) ced ON ce.clinical_event_id = ced.clinical_event_id WHERE cs.cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId} AND p.stable_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY ce.clinical_event_id ASC
